title: GPU Computed Grass
description: A dense realistic grass field with WebGL2 multiple-render-target blade data, Voronoi clump structure, terrain-conforming Bezier blades, distance LOD and culling, wind-facing yaw, travelling sway, clump-normal lighting, translucency, and distance blending.
techniques: Voronoi clump direction and presence fields
distance LOD vertex folding and stochastic culling
clump-normal lighting and backlit grass translucency
